tools.name: Checkov
tools.description: IaC scanner for Terraform, CloudFormation, Kubernetes, Helm, and Docker.

tools.name: Trivy
tools.description: Vulnerability and misconfiguration scanner for containers, filesystems, and IaC.

tools.name: Grype
tools.description: Vulnerability scanner for container images and filesystems (Anchore).

tools.name: Grant
tools.description: License compliance scanner for container images, filesystems, and SBOMs (Anchore).

tools.name: Dockle
tools.description: Container image linter for security best practices.

tools.name: Semgrep
tools.description: Static application security testing (SAST) for many languages.

tools.name: TFLint
tools.description: Terraform linter focused on best practices and provider-specific rules.

tools.name: Conftest (OPA)
tools.description: Test configuration files against Open Policy Agent (OPA) Rego policies.

tools.name: Kubeconform
tools.description: Kubernetes manifest validator using JSON schemas.

tools.name: SonarQube
tools.description: Code quality and security analysis platform.

tools.name: SBOM (Syft)
tools.description: Software Bill of Materials generation and compliance checks via Syft/CycloneDX.

tools.name: detect-secrets
tools.description: Enterprise-friendly tool for detecting secrets in code.

tools.name: Gitleaks
tools.description: Static analysis tool for detecting hardcoded secrets in git repos and files.

rules.title: Pin versions in apt get install
rules.description: Debian packages should be pinned to a specific version to ensure reproducible builds and avoid unexpected upgrades.
rules.fix_guide: Use apt-get install package=version, e.g. apt-get install curl=7.88.1-4+deb12u5

rules.title: Always tag the version of an image explicitly
rules.description: Using a mutable tag like latest can cause unpredictable deployments.
rules.fix_guide: Use a specific image tag or digest: FROM node:20.11-alpine

rules.title: Last user should not be root
rules.description: Running containers as root increases blast radius if the container is compromised.
rules.fix_guide: Add a non-root USER instruction before the end of the Dockerfile.

rules.title: Avoid apt-get upgrade
rules.description: apt-get upgrade in Dockerfiles produces non-reproducible image layers.
rules.fix_guide: Remove apt-get upgrade; pin specific package versions instead.

rules.title: Avoid additional packages by using --no-install-recommends
rules.description: Installing recommended packages increases image size and attack surface.
rules.fix_guide: Use apt-get install --no-install-recommends.

rules.title: Pin versions in pip install
rules.description: Unpinned pip packages can change between builds.
rules.fix_guide: Use pip install package==version in requirements or install line.

rules.title: Use JSON notation for CMD and ENTRYPOINT
rules.description: Exec form avoids shell injection and signal handling issues.
rules.fix_guide: Use CMD ["executable", "param1"] instead of shell form.

rules.title: Ensure that a user for the container has been created
rules.description: Containers should not run as root.
rules.fix_guide: Add a non-root USER in the Dockerfile or Kubernetes securityContext.

rules.title: Ensure that HEALTHCHECK is present
rules.description: Docker images should define a HEALTHCHECK so orchestrators can detect unhealthy containers.
rules.fix_guide: Add HEALTHCHECK CMD curl -f http://localhost/ || exit 1

rules.title: S3 bucket access logging disabled
rules.description: S3 buckets should have access logging enabled for audit and incident response.
rules.fix_guide: Set logging configuration on the aws_s3_bucket resource.

rules.title: Liveness probe should be configured
rules.description: Kubernetes workloads should define liveness probes so failed pods are restarted.
rules.fix_guide: Add livenessProbe to the container spec in your Deployment manifest.

rules.title: S3 bucket versioning disabled
rules.description: Versioning protects against accidental deletion and supports recovery.
rules.fix_guide: Enable versioning on the aws_s3_bucket resource.

rules.title: S3 bucket is not encrypted
rules.description: S3 buckets should use default encryption at rest.
rules.fix_guide: Add server_side_encryption_configuration to aws_s3_bucket.

rules.title: IAM policy should not allow wildcard actions on wildcard resources
rules.description: Overly permissive IAM policies increase blast radius of credential compromise.
rules.fix_guide: Scope actions and resources to minimum required permissions.

rules.title: Unencrypted S3 bucket
rules.description: S3 buckets should encrypt data at rest using SSE.
rules.fix_guide: Add server_side_encryption_configuration block to aws_s3_bucket.

rules.title: Security group allows ingress from 0.0.0.0/0
rules.description: Overly permissive security group rules expose services to the public internet.
rules.fix_guide: Restrict cidr_blocks to required IP ranges only.

rules.title: S3 Bucket does not have logging enabled
rules.description: S3 bucket logging provides an audit trail of access to the bucket.
rules.fix_guide: Enable logging on aws_s3_bucket with a target bucket and prefix.

rules.title: RDS encryption has not been enabled
rules.description: RDS instances should encrypt storage at rest.
rules.fix_guide: Set storage_encrypted = true on aws_db_instance.

rules.title: Do not use latest tag
rules.description: Trivy detected a mutable latest tag in the Dockerfile.
rules.fix_guide: Pin the base image to a specific tag or digest.

rules.title: Image user should not be root
rules.description: Dockerfile sets or defaults to root user.
rules.fix_guide: Add USER directive with a non-zero UID.

rules.title: No HEALTHCHECK defined
rules.description: Dockerfile has no HEALTHCHECK instruction.
rules.fix_guide: Add HEALTHCHECK CMD to validate container health.

rules.title: apt-get missing --no-install-recommends
rules.description: apt-get install should use --no-install-recommends to reduce image size.
rules.fix_guide: Add --no-install-recommends to apt-get install lines.

rules.title: Containers should drop all default capabilities
rules.description: Kubernetes containers should drop unnecessary Linux capabilities.
rules.fix_guide: Set securityContext.capabilities.drop: [ALL] and add only required caps.

rules.title: Log4Shell — Apache Log4j RCE
rules.description: Log4j versions before 2.15.0 are vulnerable to remote code execution via JNDI lookup.
rules.fix_guide: Upgrade log4j-core to 2.17.1 or later, or remove the vulnerable dependency.

rules.title: Containers must not run as root
rules.description: Kubernetes pods should set securityContext.runAsNonRoot to true.
rules.fix_guide: Set securityContext.runAsNonRoot: true and runAsUser to a non-zero UID.

rules.title: Known vulnerability in dependency
rules.description: Grype matched a known CVE/GHSA in a package from the SBOM or filesystem scan.
rules.fix_guide: Upgrade the affected package to the fixed version listed in the advisory.

rules.title: License denied by policy
rules.description: A package license was found that is not on the allow list in grant.yaml / .grant.yaml.
rules.fix_guide: Remove or replace the dependency, or request a license exception via aivar suppress with legal approval.

rules.title: Package has no detected license
rules.description: Grant policy requires every package to have a known license (require-license: true).
rules.fix_guide: Identify the package license manually, upgrade to a version with SPDX metadata, or file an exception.

rules.title: Strong copyleft license detected (GPL family)
rules.description: GPL or AGPL licenses may impose source-distribution obligations incompatible with proprietary client delivery.
rules.fix_guide: Replace the dependency with a permissively licensed alternative or obtain legal approval.

rules.title: Non-SPDX license identifier
rules.description: The license string could not be matched to a standard SPDX identifier when require-known-license is enabled.
rules.fix_guide: Map the license to an SPDX ID in your SBOM or update grant policy after legal review.

rules.title: Do not use latest tag
rules.description: Images should use a specific tag instead of latest to ensure reproducibility.
rules.fix_guide: Pin the base image to a specific version tag or digest.

rules.title: Do not use apt-get upgrade
rules.description: Running apt-get upgrade in Docker builds causes non-deterministic image layers.
rules.fix_guide: Remove apt-get upgrade; pin package versions instead.

rules.title: Use of eval() detected
rules.description: eval() executes arbitrary code and is a common injection vector.
rules.fix_guide: Replace eval() with ast.literal_eval() for safe parsing, or redesign to avoid dynamic execution.

rules.title: Private key detected in source
rules.description: Private keys committed to source control can lead to credential compromise.
rules.fix_guide: Remove the key, rotate credentials, and use a secrets manager.

rules.title: Unused variable or declaration
rules.description: Terraform variables or resources declared but never used add maintenance burden.
rules.fix_guide: Remove unused variables or reference them in your configuration.

rules.title: Invalid EC2 instance type
rules.description: The instance type may not exist in the target AWS region.
rules.fix_guide: Use a valid instance type for your region (e.g. t3.micro).

rules.title: SQL injection vulnerability
rules.description: User input is used to build SQL queries without sanitization.
rules.fix_guide: Use parameterized queries / prepared statements instead of string concatenation.

rules.title: Hard-coded credentials
rules.description: Credentials should not be hard-coded in source code.
rules.fix_guide: Load secrets from environment variables or a secrets manager.

rules.title: SBOM file not present
rules.description: Client deliverables require a CycloneDX or SPDX SBOM for supply-chain transparency.
rules.fix_guide: Run syft packages dir:. -o cyclonedx-json > sbom.json in your release pipeline.

rules.title: SBOM older than release artifact
rules.description: The SBOM must be generated from the same build as the shipped artifact.
rules.fix_guide: Regenerate SBOM as part of the main branch packaging step, not manually.

rules.title: Secret detected in source
rules.description: detect-secrets found a high-entropy string or known secret pattern in the codebase.
rules.fix_guide: Remove the secret, rotate credentials, and use a secrets manager or environment variables.

rules.title: Hardcoded secret detected
rules.description: Gitleaks matched a secret in the repository or filesystem.
rules.fix_guide: Remove the secret from source, rotate it, and add a gitleaks allowlist entry only via aivar suppress.
